revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=上許曾神社| 所在地=滋賀県長浜市浅井町高山2| 祭神=草野姫命| 社格=式内社
郷社| 創建=[[延暦]]8年| 本殿=千鳥唐破風付[[入母屋造]]| 例祭=[[4月10日]]| 神事=}} '''上許曾神社'''（かみこそじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である == 祭神 == * 主祭神 ** [[草野姫命]] * 配祀神 ** 大己貴命 ** 事代主命 ** 住吉大神 ** 埴山大神 == 歴史 == :[[延暦]]8年、参議[[橘奈良麻呂]]が勧請したと伝わる[[式内社]]である。[[仁寿]]元年、正六位を賜ったとの記録がある。[[治承]]年間に相殿四神を配祀した。[[明治]]9年に村社、明治15年に郷社に列格した。 == 祭り == * 例祭 :4月10日に行われる。 == 関連項目 == * [[神道]] * [[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:郷社]] [[Category:長浜市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{神社 |名称 = 上許曾神社 |画像 = [[画像:Gazoubosyu.jpg]] |所在地 = 滋賀県長浜市高山町2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|28|27.1|N|136|19|02.1|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = 草野姫命 |社格 = 式内小社
旧郷社 |創建 = 延暦8年（789年） |本殿 = [[入母屋造]] |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = [[4月10日]] |神事 = }} '''上許曾神社'''（かみこそじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 祭神 == * 主祭神 ** [[草野姫命]] * 配祀神 ** [[大己貴命]] ** [[事代主命]] ** [[住吉大神]] ** [[ハニヤス|埴山大神]] == 歴史 == [[延暦]]8年（[[789年]]）、[[参議]][[橘奈良麻呂]]が[[勧請]]したと伝わる[[式内社]]である。[[仁寿]]元年（[[851年]]）、正六位を賜ったとの記録がある。[[治承]]年間（1177-81年）に[[相殿]]4神を配祀した。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）に[[村社]]、明治15年に[[郷社]]に列格した。 == 祭り == * 例祭 :4月10日に行われる。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:郷社]] [[Category:長浜市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{神社 |名称 = 上許曾神社 |画像 = [[画像:Gazoubosyu.jpg]] |所在地 = 滋賀県長浜市高山町2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|28|27.1|N|136|19|02.1|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = 草野姫命 |社格 = 式内小社

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamikoso Shrine'''|上許曾神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:41 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 上許曾神社 |画像 = [[File:Kamikoso shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]高山町2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|28|27.1|N|136|19|02.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[草野姫命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = [[延暦]]8年（[[789年]]） |本殿 = [[入母屋造]] |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = [[4月10日]] |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=上許曾神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''上許曾神社'''（かみこそじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 祭神 == * 主祭神 ** [[草野姫命]] * 配祀神 ** [[大己貴命]] ** [[事代主命]] ** [[住吉大神]] ** [[ハニヤス|埴山大神]] == 歴史 == [[延暦]]8年（[[789年]]）、[[参議]][[橘奈良麻呂]]が[[勧請]]したと伝わる[[式内社]]である。[[仁寿]]元年（[[851年]]）、正六位を賜ったとの記録がある。[[治承]]年間（1177-81年）に[[相殿]]4神を配祀した。[[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）に[[村社]]、明治15年に[[郷社]]に列格した。 == 祭り == * 例祭 :4月10日に行われる。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]

{{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:41 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 上許曾神社 |画像 = [[File:Kamikoso shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高山町2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|28|27.1|N|136|19|02.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|草野姫命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（小）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|延暦|Q1373176}}8年（{{jalink|789年|Q31558}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|入母屋造|Q855025}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月10日|Q2502}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=上許曾神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''上許曾神社'''（かみこそじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 ** {{jalink|草野姫命}} * 配祀神 ** {{jalink|大己貴命}} ** {{jalink|事代主命}} ** {{jalink|住吉大神}} ** {{jalink|ハニヤス|Q9285919|埴山大神}} === 歴史 === {{jalink|延暦|Q1373176}}8年（{{jalink|789年|Q31558}}）、{{jalink|参議|Q1133663}}{{jalink|橘奈良麻呂|Q7673717}}が{{jalink|勧請}}したと伝わる{{jalink|式内社}}である。{{jalink|仁寿|Q1373077}}元年（{{jalink|851年|Q29966}}）、正六位を賜ったとの記録がある。{{jalink|治承|Q1194671}}年間（1177-81年）に{{jalink|相殿|Q135009883}}4神を配祀した。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、明治15年に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格した。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :4月10日に行われる。 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]

{{出典の明記|date=2016年6月14日 (火) 12:41 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 上許曾神社 |画像 = [[File:Kamikoso shrine.jpg|270px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}高山町2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|28|27.1|N|136|19|02.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|草野姫命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（小）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|延暦|Q1373176}}8年（{{jalink|789年|Q31558}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|入母屋造|Q855025}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|4月10日|Q2502}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=上許曾神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''上許曾神社'''（かみこそじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|長浜市|Q844130}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 祭神 === * 主祭神 ** {{jalink|草野姫命}} * 配祀神 ** {{jalink|大己貴命}} ** {{jalink|事代主命}} ** {{jalink|住吉大神}} ** {{jalink|ハニヤス|Q9285919|埴山大神}} === 歴史 === {{jalink|延暦|Q1373176}}8年（{{jalink|789年|Q31558}}）、{{jalink|参議|Q1133663}}{{jalink|橘奈良麻呂|Q7673717}}が{{jalink|勧請}}したと伝わる{{jalink|式内社}}である。{{jalink|仁寿|Q1373077}}元年（{{jalink|851年|Q29966}}）、正六位を賜ったとの記録がある。{{jalink|治承|Q1194671}}年間（1177-81年）に{{jalink|相殿|Q135009883}}4神を配祀した。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、明治15年に{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格した。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :4月10日に行われる。 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

June 2016 (Tue) 12:41 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Kamikoso Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kamikoso shrine.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takayama-chō 2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|28|27.1|N|136|19|02.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Kusanohime|Q11365189|Kusanohime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor)
former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|789|Q31558}} (Enryaku 8) |本殿 = {{jalink|irimoya-zukuri|Q855025}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 10|Q2502}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Kamikoso Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Kamikoso Shrine''' (かみこそじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * Principal deity ** {{jalink|Kusanohime|Q11365189|Kusanohime-no-Mikoto}} * Associated deities ** {{jalink|Ōnamuchi|Q702140|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} ** {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} ** {{jalink|Sumiyoshi Ōkami}} ** {{jalink|Haniyasuhime|Q9285919|Haniyama Ōkami}} === History === It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} said to have been {{jalink|kanjō|Q1146687}}-enshrined by {{jalink|Sangi|Q1133663}} {{jalink|Tachibana no Naramaro|Q7673717}} in {{jalink|789|Q31558}} (Enryaku 8). There is a record that in {{jalink|851|Q29966}} (Ninju 1), it was granted Senior Sixth Rank. In the {{jalink|Jishō|Q1194671}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{jalink|aidono|Q135009883}}. In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}} Takayama-chō 2 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|28|27.1|N|136|19|02.1|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Kusanohime|Q11365189|Kusanohime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (minor)
former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|789|Q31558}} (Enryaku 8) |本殿 = {{jalink|irimoya-zukuri|Q855025}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{jalink|April 10|Q2502}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Kamikoso Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Kamikoso Shrine''' (かみこそじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Nagahama|Q844130}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. === Enshrined deities === * Principal deity ** {{jalink|Kusanohime|Q11365189|Kusanohime-no-Mikoto}} * Associated deities ** {{jalink|Ōnamuchi|Q702140|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} ** {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} ** {{jalink|Sumiyoshi Ōkami}} ** {{jalink|Haniyasuhime|Q9285919|Haniyama Ōkami}} === History === It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} said to have been {{jalink|kanjō|Q1146687}}-enshrined by {{jalink|Sangi|Q1133663}} {{jalink|Tachibana no Naramaro|Q7673717}} in {{jalink|789|Q31558}} (Enryaku 8). There is a record that in {{jalink|851|Q29966}} (Ninju 1), it was granted Senior Sixth Rank. In the {{jalink|Jishō|Q1194671}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{jalink|aidono|Q135009883}}. In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

There is a record that in {{jalink|851|Q29966}} (Ninju 1), it was granted Senior Sixth Rank. In the {{jalink|Jishō|Q1194671}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{jalink|aidono|Q135009883}}. In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]]

There is a record that in {{ill|lt=851|Q29966|WD=Q29966}} (Ninju 1), it was granted Senior Sixth Rank. In the {{ill|lt=Jishō|Q1194671|WD=Q1194671}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{ill|lt=aidono|Q135009883|WD=Q135009883}}. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

In the {{ill|lt=Jishō|Q1194671|WD=Q1194671}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{ill|lt=aidono|Q135009883|WD=Q135009883}}. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

There is a record that in {{ill|lt=851|Q29966|WD=Q29966|1=851}} (Ninju 1), it was granted Senior Sixth Rank. In the {{ill|lt=Jishō|Q1194671|WD=Q1194671|1=Jishō}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{ill|lt=aidono|Q135009883|WD=Q135009883|1=Aidono}}. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かみこそしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:長浜市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

There is a record that in {{ill|lt=851|Q29966|WD=Q29966|1=851}} (Ninju 1), it was granted Senior Sixth Rank. In the {{ill|lt=Jishō|Q1194671|WD=Q1194671|1=Jishō}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{ill|lt=aidono|Q135009883|WD=Q135009883|1=Aidono}}. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=789|Q31558|WD=Q31558|1=789}} (Enryaku 8) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=irimoya-zukuri|Q855025|WD=Q855025|1=East Asian hip-and-gable roof}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 10|Q2502|WD=Q2502|1=April 10}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Kamikoso Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Kamikoso Shrine''' (かみこそじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * Principal deity ** {{ill|lt=Kusanohime|Q11365189|WD=Q11365189|lt=Kusanohime-no-Mikoto|1=Hayato Nakamura}} * Associated deities ** {{ill|lt=Ōnamuchi|Q702140|WD=Q702140|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} ** {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} ** {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumiyoshi Ōkami|WD=Q1114013|1=Sumiyoshi sanjin}} ** {{ill|lt=Haniyasuhime|Q9285919|WD=Q9285919|lt=Haniyama Ōkami|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}} === History === It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} said to have been {{ill|lt=kanjō|Q1146687|WD=Q1146687|1=Cuy}}-enshrined by {{ill|lt=Sangi|Q1133663|WD=Q1133663|1=Sangi (Japan)}} {{ill|lt=Tachibana no Naramaro|Q7673717|WD=Q7673717|1=Tachibana no Naramaro}} in {{ill|lt=789|Q31558|WD=Q31558|1=789}} (Enryaku 8). There is a record that in {{ill|lt=851|Q29966|WD=Q29966|1=851}} (Ninju 1), it was granted Senior Sixth Rank. In the {{ill|lt=Jishō|Q1194671|WD=Q1194671|1=Jishō}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{ill|lt=aidono|Q135009883|WD=Q135009883|1=Aidono}}. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:上許曾神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11360119}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=14 June 2016 (Tue) 12:41 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Kamikoso Shrine |画像 = [[File:Kamikoso shrine.jpg|270px]]

former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=789|Q31558|qid=Q31558|1=789}} (Enryaku 8) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=irimoya-zukuri|Q855025|qid=Q855025|1=East Asian hip-and-gable roof}} |別名 = |札所 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 10|Q2502|qid=Q2502|1=April 10}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Kamikoso Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Kamikoso Shrine''' (かみこそじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === * Principal deity ** {{ill|lt=Kusanohime|Q11365189|qid=Q11365189|lt=Kusanohime-no-Mikoto|1=Hayato Nakamura}} * Associated deities ** {{ill|lt=Ōnamuchi|Q702140|qid=Q702140|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} ** {{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} ** {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumiyoshi Ōkami|qid=Q1114013|1=Sumiyoshi sanjin}} ** {{ill|lt=Haniyasuhime|Q9285919|qid=Q9285919|lt=Haniyama Ōkami|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}} === History === It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} said to have been {{ill|lt=kanjō|Q1146687|qid=Q1146687|1=Cuy}}-enshrined by {{ill|lt=Sangi|Q1133663|qid=Q1133663|1=Sangi (Japan)}} {{ill|lt=Tachibana no Naramaro|Q7673717|qid=Q7673717|1=Tachibana no Naramaro}} in {{ill|lt=789|Q31558|qid=Q31558|1=789}} (Enryaku 8). There is a record that in {{ill|lt=851|Q29966|qid=Q29966|1=851}} (Ninju 1), it was granted Senior Sixth Rank. In the {{ill|lt=Jishō|Q1194671|qid=Q1194671|1=Jishō}} era (1177-1181), four deities were enshrined in the {{ill|lt=aidono|Q135009883|qid=Q135009883|1=Aidono}}. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|qid=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in Meiji 15 it was promoted to {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Festivals === * Annual festival :Held on April 10. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1104 上許曾神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kamikoso Shrine]][[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]
